records.title: Workbench: Configure the Python Service
records.content:
## Overview

Connect Workbench to its supported Python service.

## Validation

Confirm the health endpoint and provider status before publishing.

records.title: Workbench health endpoint unavailable after cold start
records.content: The hosted Python service can require a cold-start interval before its health endpoint responds.
records.symptom: The WordPress interface reports that the backend endpoint is unavailable.
records.workaround: Wait for the service to become healthy, then retry the request.

records.title: Workbench v5.0.0
records.content:
## Release overview

Connected Scientific and Engineering Workbench release.
